Sheet metal folding systems · Est. 1994 Precision folding, engineered for fabricators. For three decades we have built folding machinery that fabricators rely on — robust frames, repeatable accuracy, and controls that feel as considered as the parts they shape. From high-rigidity double folding machines
              to servo-electric flagships, our line-up covers every bend a
              modern fabrication shop needs to make.
